exercises.title: Floyd's detect cycle
Why Floyd's works — explanation
exercises.expected_solution:
public class WhyFloyd{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println("Fast gains 1 step per iteration over slow.");System.out.println("In a cycle of length C, gap starts at 0, grows each step.");System.out.println("After C steps, fast has gained C steps = full cycle = back to slow.");System.out.println("They MUST meet within C iterations of entering cycle.");System.out.println("Key: inside cycle, fast always catches slow.");}
}
